---
# title: "Ligea Alexander"
title-block-banner: true
image: images/italy.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/ligeaalexander
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ligeaalexander/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:ligea.alex@gmail.com
---

<h1>Ligea Alexander</h1>
<ul class="no-bullets">
<p>She is a human-centered designer based in NYC, NY.<p>
<p>She is a burgeoning interactives designer/IxD.<p>
<p>She is a multi-disciplinary visual storyteller. <p>
<p>She is a data-person.<p>
<p>She is an intermediate level German speaker.<p>
<p>She is a cat stewardess. <p>
<p>She is Trinidadian born and raised (and quite proud of that).<p>
<p><strong>She is super excited to work with you!</strong><p>
</ul>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.grid}

<!-- ::: {.g-col-md-6}
Stuff

:::

::: {.g-col-md-6}
## Blogs
Click [here](project2/welcome/index.qmd) to play more in the playground.

::: -->

:::
